videos.title: A CROSS COUNTRY SKIER | From Training to Triumph: Inside Red Bull Nordenskiöldsloppet
videos.description:
In the early morning of March 26, 2022 Kristoffer Hjärtström stands on the starting line of his biggest challenge yet. He's about to start Red Bull Nordenskiöldsloppet, the longest and toughest cross-country ski race in existence. The race covers 220 kilometers in the arctic wilderness. His entire season has led up to this moment, and now he will find out if his painstaking training and preparations will have been enough.

The film is presented by True Story:
https://truestorysport.com/

Check out Kristoffer on Instagram and Youtube:
https://instagram.com/kriggminator
https://youtube.com/@kristofferhjartstrom

If you enjoyed this film and would like to help me make more projects like this, please consider donating: 
https://ko-fi.com/tobiasjohansson

Thank you for watching!

#crosscountryskiing #redbull
